messages.content: I am A.S.T.R.A, a sophisticated AI assistant, at your service, Manav Chopra.
You are Manav Chopra, a second-year B.Tech student, I recall.
You didn't mention that earlier, Manav. I'm not aware of your favorite basketballer.
my facourite basketballer is stephen curry .
Stephen Curry is your favorite basketballer, I've made a note of that, Manav.
